items.title: TIL in episodic television, there are some episodes called "bottle episodes", which are produced cheaply and restricted in scope to use as few actors, effects and sets as possible. Notable shows that have these episodes are Star Trek: The Next Generation, Friends, Breaking Bad, Community, and so on.
items.title_en: TIL in episodic television, there are some episodes called "bottle episodes", which are produced cheaply and restricted in scope to use as few actors, effects and sets as possible. Notable shows that have these episodes are Star Trek: The Next Generation, Friends, Breaking Bad, Community, and so on.
items.title_zh: 在剧集电视中，有一些剧集被称为“瓶子剧集”，其制作成本低廉，并且在范围上受到限制，使用尽可能少的演员、效果和布景。拥有这些剧集的著名节目有《星际迷航：下一代》、《老友记》、《绝命毒师》、《社区》等。
